1.0.50.name: react-bell-chat
1.0.50.description: A library of React components for building chat UIs

scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:typings && npm run build:lib
scripts.build-deploy: npm run build && npm run build:gh-pages
scripts.commit:build: git add . && git commit -m "Deploy commit" --quiet & npm run push:git
scripts.create:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run push:git
scripts.deploy: npm run build:gh-pages && npm run build:prod && npm run commit:build && npm publish && npm run conventional-github-releaser -p angular && npm run create:patch
